bird.name: Black imperial pigeon
bird.summary: The black imperial pigeon (Ducula melanochroa), also known as the Bismarck imperial pigeon, is a species of bird in the pigeon family, Colu…

locations.name: 菲利普·斯克莱特
locations.summary: 菲利普·勒特利·斯克莱特（英語：Philip Lutley Sclater，1829年11月4日—1913年6月27日）是一位英国律师和动物学家，主要从事鳥類學研究，开创性地建立了动物地理学分区。 参考资料 外部链接 维基共享资源上的相關…

locations.name: 俾斯麦群岛
locations.summary: 俾斯麦群岛（英文：Bismarck Archipelago）是太平洋西南部一群岛，位于新几内亚岛东北，濒临俾斯麦海，由200多个岛屿组成，总陆地面积49700平方公里，主要岛屿有新不列颠岛、新爱尔兰岛等，人口31.4万人，现全部属于巴布亚…

relations.subject: Black imperial pigeon
relations.evidence: First described by English zoologist Philip Sclater in 1878, it is endemic to the Bismarck Archipelago, where it mainly inhabits rainforest and cloud forest in mountain areas above

relations.subject: Black imperial pigeon
relations.evidence: David |last7=Mayaux |first7=Philippe |date=2008 |title=Using remote sensing to inform conservation status assessment: Estimates of recent deforestation rates on New Britain and the impacts upon endemic birds |url=https://linkinghub.elsevier.com/retrieve/pii/S0006320707003564 |journal=Biological Conservation |language=en |volume=141 |issue=1 |page=62 |doi=10.1016/j.biocon.2007.08.023|bibcode=2008BCons.141...56B |url-access=subscription }} Although it has shown an ability to tolerate selective logging in forests on New Ireland, its population is thought to currently be declining due to habitat destruction
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
